Model-Human Alignment: Correlation, Accuracy, and Constraint Analysis

2026-03-05

Overview

This analysis examines three complementary perspectives on how language models develop binomial ordering preferences during training:

  1. Correlation: Pearson r between model preference and human preference at each checkpoint
  2. Accuracy: Proportion of binomials where model and human agree on ordering direction (binary match)
  3. Constraint sensitivity: How model preferences align with individual linguistic constraints (Form, Percept, Culture, etc.) and the composite GenPref measure

All analyses are conducted separately for nonce (novel) and attested (corpus-found) binomials.

Load and Prepare Data

# Load pre-processed data. Run prepare_data.py first if any file is missing.
# Constraint and GenPref regressions are fit below in R (see Analysis 3 & 4).
processed_path <- "../Data/processed"

csv_names <- c(
  "nonce_correlations", "attested_correlations",
  "nonce_accuracy",     "attested_accuracy",
  "final_nonce",        "final_attested",
  "training_nonce",     "training_attested"
)

missing <- csv_names[!file.exists(file.path(processed_path, paste0(csv_names, ".csv")))]
if (length(missing) > 0) {
  stop(sprintf(
    "Missing processed files: %s\nRun prepare_data.py first.",
    paste(missing, collapse = ", ")
  ))
}

for (nm in csv_names) {
  assign(nm, read_csv(file.path(processed_path, paste0(nm, ".csv")),
                      show_col_types = FALSE))
}

cat(sprintf("Nonce correlations:    %d rows\n",  nrow(nonce_correlations)))
## Nonce correlations:    5663 rows
cat(sprintf("Attested correlations: %d rows\n",  nrow(attested_correlations)))
## Attested correlations: 5663 rows
cat(sprintf("Final nonce data:      %d rows\n",  nrow(final_nonce)))
## Final nonce data:      786 rows
cat(sprintf("Final attested data:   %d rows\n",  nrow(final_attested)))
## Final attested data:   3564 rows
cat(sprintf("Training nonce:        %d rows (%d checkpoints)\n",
            nrow(training_nonce),    n_distinct(training_nonce$checkpoint)))
## Training nonce:        14934 rows (87 checkpoints)
cat(sprintf("Training attested:     %d rows (%d checkpoints)\n",
            nrow(training_attested), n_distinct(training_attested$checkpoint)))
## Training attested:     67716 rows (87 checkpoints)
# Fit OLS constraint regressions and GenPref regressions in R at the
# log-sampled checkpoints (stored in training_nonce / training_attested).

CONSTRAINT_COLS <- c("Form", "Percept", "Culture", "Power", "Intense",
                     "Icon", "Freq", "Len", "Lapse", "BStress")

fit_constraint_models_R <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    group_by(model, checkpoint, step, tokens) %>%
    group_map(function(g, keys) {
      complete <- g %>%
        select(preference, all_of(CONSTRAINT_COLS)) %>%
        drop_na()
      if (nrow(complete) < 15) return(NULL)
      fit <- lm(reformulate(CONSTRAINT_COLS, "preference"), data = complete)
      cf  <- coef(summary(fit))
      tibble(
        model      = keys$model,
        checkpoint = keys$checkpoint,
        step       = keys$step,
        tokens     = keys$tokens,
        constraint  = rownames(cf)[-1],
        coefficient = cf[-1, "Estimate"],
        se          = cf[-1, "Std. Error"],
        p_value     = cf[-1, "Pr(>|t|)"]
      )
    }, .keep = TRUE) %>%
    bind_rows()
}

fit_genpref_models_R <- function(data) {
  data %>%
    group_by(model, checkpoint, step, tokens) %>%
    group_map(function(g, keys) {
      complete <- g %>% select(preference, GenPref) %>% drop_na()
      if (nrow(complete) < 5) return(NULL)
      fit <- lm(preference ~ GenPref, data = complete)
      cf  <- coef(summary(fit))
      tibble(
        model      = keys$model,
        checkpoint = keys$checkpoint,
        step       = keys$step,
        tokens     = keys$tokens,
        coefficient = cf["GenPref", "Estimate"],
        se          = cf["GenPref", "Std. Error"],
        p_value     = cf["GenPref", "Pr(>|t|)"]
      )
    }, .keep = TRUE) %>%
    bind_rows()
}

cat("Fitting constraint models (nonce)...\n")
## Fitting constraint models (nonce)...
nonce_constraints    <- fit_constraint_models_R(training_nonce)
cat("Fitting constraint models (attested)...\n")
## Fitting constraint models (attested)...
attested_constraints <- fit_constraint_models_R(training_attested)

cat("Fitting GenPref models (nonce)...\n")
## Fitting GenPref models (nonce)...
nonce_genpref    <- fit_genpref_models_R(training_nonce)
cat("Fitting GenPref models (attested)...\n")
## Fitting GenPref models (attested)...
attested_genpref <- fit_genpref_models_R(training_attested)

cat(sprintf("Constraint results: nonce %d rows, attested %d rows\n",
            nrow(nonce_constraints), nrow(attested_constraints)))
## Constraint results: nonce 912 rows, attested 1140 rows
cat(sprintf("GenPref results:    nonce %d rows, attested %d rows\n",
            nrow(nonce_genpref),    nrow(attested_genpref)))
## GenPref results:    nonce 114 rows, attested 114 rows
# Consistent model ordering for all plots:
# BabyLM (125M → 350M → 1.3B) then C4 (125M → 350M → 1.3B)
MODEL_LEVELS <- c(
  "znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964",
  "znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964",
  "znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964",
  "znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964",
  "znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964",
  "znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964"
)
MODEL_LABELS <- c(
  "BabyLM 125M", "BabyLM 350M", "BabyLM 1.3B",
  "C4 125M",     "C4 350M",     "C4 1.3B"
)
fct_model <- function(x) factor(x, levels = MODEL_LEVELS, labels = MODEL_LABELS)

CORPUS_COLORS <- c(
  "BabyLM 125M" = "#1b7837", "BabyLM 350M" = "#5aae61", "BabyLM 1.3B" = "#a6dba0",
  "C4 125M"     = "#762a83", "C4 350M"     = "#af8dc3", "C4 1.3B"     = "#e7d4e8"
)

Analysis 1: Correlation Over Training

Compute Pearson r between model preference and human preference at each checkpoint.

cat("\n=== FINAL CORRELATIONS ===\n\n")
## 
## === FINAL CORRELATIONS ===
cat("NONCE BINOMIALS:\n")
## NONCE BINOMIALS:
nonce_correlations %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  slice_max(tokens, n = 1) %>%
  select(model, tokens, correlation) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model tokens correlation
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.195
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 -0.033
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 -0.003
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 9987686400 -0.018
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 9987686400 0.031
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 9987686400 -0.131 
cat("\nATTESTED BINOMIALS:\n")
## 
## ATTESTED BINOMIALS:
attested_correlations %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  slice_max(tokens, n = 1) %>%
  select(model, tokens, correlation) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model tokens correlation
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.472
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.587
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.447
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 9987686400 0.665
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 9987686400 0.677
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 9987686400 0.551

Plot: Correlation Over Training

bind_rows(
  nonce_correlations    %>% mutate(item_type = "Nonce"),
  attested_correlations %>% mutate(item_type = "Attested")
) %>%
  mutate(model = fct_model(model)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = correlation, color = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_grid(item_type ~ model, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = CORPUS_COLORS) +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "Pearson r (model vs. human preference)",
    title    = "Model-Human Correlation Over Training",
    subtitle = "Attested (top) vs. Nonce (bottom) | BabyLM models (left) → C4 models (right)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

Analysis 2: Accuracy Over Training

Accuracy = proportion of binomials where model and human agree on ordering direction.

  • Model direction: mean preference > 0.5 (prefers alphabetical) vs. ≤ 0.5
  • Human direction: hum_pref > 0.5 vs. ≤ 0.5
  • Correct if both agree on direction
cat("\n=== FINAL ACCURACIES ===\n\n")
## 
## === FINAL ACCURACIES ===
cat("NONCE BINOMIALS:\n")
## NONCE BINOMIALS:
nonce_accuracy %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  slice_max(tokens, n = 1) %>%
  select(model, tokens, accuracy) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model tokens accuracy
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.542
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.481
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.489
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 9987686400 0.458
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 9987686400 0.511
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 9987686400 0.427 
cat("\nATTESTED BINOMIALS:\n")
## 
## ATTESTED BINOMIALS:
attested_accuracy %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  slice_max(tokens, n = 1) %>%
  select(model, tokens, accuracy) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model tokens accuracy
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.662
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.692
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 0.614
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 9987686400 0.685
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 9987686400 0.705
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 9987686400 0.680

Plot: Accuracy Over Training

bind_rows(
  nonce_accuracy    %>% mutate(item_type = "Nonce"),
  attested_accuracy %>% mutate(item_type = "Attested")
) %>%
  mutate(model = fct_model(model)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = accuracy, color = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_grid(item_type ~ model, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_color_manual(values = CORPUS_COLORS) +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "Accuracy (proportion direction match)",
    title    = "Model-Human Direction Agreement Over Training",
    subtitle = "Attested (top) vs. Nonce (bottom) | BabyLM (left) → C4 (right); dashed = chance (50%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

Analysis 3: Individual Constraint Effects Over Training

For each checkpoint, fit: lm(preference ~ Form + Percept + Culture + Power + Intense + Icon + Freq + Len + Lapse + BStress)

cat("\n=== FINAL CONSTRAINT COEFFICIENTS ===\n\n")
## 
## === FINAL CONSTRAINT COEFFICIENTS ===
cat("NONCE BINOMIALS (final checkpoint):\n")
## NONCE BINOMIALS (final checkpoint):
nonce_constraints %>%
  group_by(model, constraint) %>%
  slice_max(tokens, n = 1) %>%
  select(model, constraint, coefficient) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = constraint, values_from = coefficient) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model BStress Culture Freq Intense Lapse Len Percept Power
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 0.676 1.166 -0.033 0.576 -0.843 0.216 -0.111 0.285
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 -0.073 0.051 0.164 -0.668 0.314 -0.463 0.146 0.947
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 0.363 -0.228 0.102 -0.431 0.040 -0.198 0.516 0.332
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 -0.027 0.261 -0.061 -0.079 0.043 -0.152 0.140 0.194
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 -0.135 -0.013 -0.009 0.261 0.021 -0.051 -0.101 0.075
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 -0.596 -0.308 0.048 -0.202 1.092 -0.238 0.101 -0.084 
cat("\nATTESTED BINOMIALS (final checkpoint):\n")
## 
## ATTESTED BINOMIALS (final checkpoint):
attested_constraints %>%
  group_by(model, constraint) %>%
  slice_max(tokens, n = 1) %>%
  select(model, constraint, coefficient) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = constraint, values_from = coefficient) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model BStress Culture Form Freq Icon Intense Lapse Len Percept Power
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 -0.279 0.926 0.652 0.155 1.536 0.217 0.146 0.203 0.502 0.758
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 0.116 0.766 0.637 0.284 1.357 0.080 -0.041 0.179 0.310 1.158
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 0.220 0.366 0.479 -0.003 0.602 0.152 -0.012 0.004 0.215 0.885
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 0.377 0.707 0.438 0.135 1.741 0.363 -0.153 0.270 0.507 0.715
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 0.219 0.805 0.335 0.095 1.505 0.397 -0.071 0.302 0.487 0.789
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 0.225 0.518 0.272 0.062 1.189 0.631 -0.043 0.164 0.322 0.542

Plot: Individual Constraint Coefficients Over Training (Nonce)

nonce_constraints %>%
  mutate(model = fct_model(model)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = coefficient, color = constraint)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "Coefficient",
    title    = "Individual Constraint Effects Over Training — NONCE Binomials",
    subtitle = "OLS: preference ~ constraints | BabyLM (top row) → C4 (bottom row)",
    color    = "Constraint"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2))

Plot: Individual Constraint Coefficients Over Training (Attested)

attested_constraints %>%
  mutate(model = fct_model(model)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = coefficient, color = constraint)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "Coefficient",
    title    = "Individual Constraint Effects Over Training — ATTESTED Binomials",
    subtitle = "OLS: preference ~ constraints | BabyLM (top row) → C4 (bottom row)",
    color    = "Constraint"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2))

Analysis 4: GenPref Effect Over Training

Fit lm(preference ~ GenPref) at each checkpoint to track overall sensitivity to the composite measure.

cat("\n=== FINAL GENPREF COEFFICIENTS ===\n\n")
## 
## === FINAL GENPREF COEFFICIENTS ===
cat("NONCE BINOMIALS:\n")
## NONCE BINOMIALS:
nonce_genpref %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  slice_max(tokens, n = 1) %>%
  select(model, tokens, coefficient) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model tokens coefficient
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 8965324800 4.735
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 3.295
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 2.086
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 9987686400 0.706
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 9987686400 -0.428
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 9987686400 -0.399 
cat("\nATTESTED BINOMIALS:\n")
## 
## ATTESTED BINOMIALS:
attested_genpref %>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  slice_max(tokens, n = 1) %>%
  select(model, tokens, coefficient) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model tokens coefficient
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 8965324800 6.282
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 6.586
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 8965324800 2.665
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 9987686400 7.020
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 9987686400 6.535
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 9987686400 4.672

Plot: GenPref Coefficient Over Training

bind_rows(
  nonce_genpref    %>% mutate(item_type = "Nonce"),
  attested_genpref %>% mutate(item_type = "Attested")
) %>%
  mutate(model = fct_model(model)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = coefficient, color = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_grid(item_type ~ model, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = CORPUS_COLORS) +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "GenPref coefficient",
    title    = "GenPref Effect Over Training",
    subtitle = "OLS: preference ~ GenPref | Nonce (top) vs. Attested (bottom) | BabyLM (left) → C4 (right)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

Combined Visualization: Correlation vs. Accuracy

bind_rows(
  nonce_correlations    %>% mutate(item_type = "Nonce",    metric = "Correlation", value = correlation),
  attested_correlations %>% mutate(item_type = "Attested", metric = "Correlation", value = correlation),
  nonce_accuracy        %>% mutate(item_type = "Nonce",    metric = "Accuracy",    value = accuracy),
  attested_accuracy     %>% mutate(item_type = "Attested", metric = "Accuracy",    value = accuracy)
) %>%
  select(model, tokens, item_type, metric, value) %>%
  mutate(model = fct_model(model)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = value, color = metric)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60", alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_grid(item_type ~ model, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Correlation" = "#E41A1C", "Accuracy" = "#377EB8")) +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "Value",
    title    = "Model-Human Alignment: Correlation vs. Accuracy",
    subtitle = "Nonce (top) vs. Attested (bottom) | BabyLM (left) → C4 (right); dashed = 0.5",
    color    = "Metric"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  )

Summary Statistics

cat("\n=== SUMMARY: INITIAL vs. FINAL VALUES ===\n\n")
## 
## === SUMMARY: INITIAL vs. FINAL VALUES ===
get_init_final <- function(data, value_col) {
  data %>%
    group_by(model) %>%
    arrange(tokens) %>%
    summarize(
      initial = first({{ value_col }}),
      final   = last({{ value_col }}),
      change  = final - initial,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}

cat("NONCE - Correlation:\n")
## NONCE - Correlation:
get_init_final(nonce_correlations, correlation) %>% kable(digits = 3)
model initial final change
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 -0.210 0.195 0.405
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 0.100 -0.033 -0.132
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 0.072 -0.003 -0.074
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 -0.219 -0.018 0.201
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 0.124 0.031 -0.093
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 0.056 -0.131 -0.186 
cat("\nNONCE - Accuracy:\n")
## 
## NONCE - Accuracy:
get_init_final(nonce_accuracy, accuracy) %>% kable(digits = 3)
model initial final change
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 0.420 0.542 0.122
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 0.397 0.481 0.084
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 0.382 0.489 0.107
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 0.397 0.458 0.061
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 0.382 0.511 0.130
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 0.382 0.427 0.046 
cat("\nATTESTED - Correlation:\n")
## 
## ATTESTED - Correlation:
get_init_final(attested_correlations, correlation) %>% kable(digits = 3)
model initial final change
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 0.051 0.472 0.421
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 -0.017 0.587 0.603
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 0.074 0.447 0.373
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 0.001 0.665 0.664
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 -0.004 0.677 0.681
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 0.061 0.551 0.490 
cat("\nATTESTED - Accuracy:\n")
## 
## ATTESTED - Accuracy:
get_init_final(attested_accuracy, accuracy) %>% kable(digits = 3)
model initial final change
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 0.490 0.662 0.172
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 0.483 0.692 0.209
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 0.498 0.614 0.116
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 0.500 0.685 0.185
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 0.490 0.705 0.215
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 0.498 0.680 0.182 
cat("\nNONCE - GenPref Coefficient:\n")
## 
## NONCE - GenPref Coefficient:
get_init_final(nonce_genpref, coefficient) %>% kable(digits = 3)
model initial final change
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 -0.313 4.735 5.048
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 0.679 3.295 2.616
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 0.180 2.086 1.906
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 -0.208 0.706 0.915
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 0.564 -0.428 -0.993
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 0.163 -0.399 -0.562 
cat("\nATTESTED - GenPref Coefficient:\n")
## 
## ATTESTED - GenPref Coefficient:
get_init_final(attested_genpref, coefficient) %>% kable(digits = 3)
model initial final change
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 0.028 6.282 6.254
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 -0.047 6.586 6.633
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 0.103 2.665 2.562
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 -0.091 7.020 7.111
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 -0.030 6.535 6.564
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 0.086 4.672 4.585

Analysis 5: Bayesian Mixed-Effects Models

library(brms)

dir.create("brms_cache", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Weakly informative priors centered at zero
bayes_priors <- c(
  prior(normal(0, 0.5), class = b),
  prior(exponential(1), class = sd),
  prior(exponential(1), class = sigma)
)

Part A: Final Checkpoint Analysis

Fit models on the final (fully trained) checkpoint for each model.

cat(sprintf(
  "Final checkpoint data: nonce %d rows, attested %d rows, across %d models\n",
  nrow(final_nonce), nrow(final_attested),
  n_distinct(c(final_nonce$model, final_attested$model))
))
## Final checkpoint data: nonce 786 rows, attested 3564 rows, across 6 models

Nonce Binomials: Final Checkpoint

# fit → extract → discard within each iteration
nonce_final_results <- map(
  setNames(unique(final_nonce$model), unique(final_nonce$model)),
  function(model_name) {
    cat(sprintf("\n=== %s (NONCE - FINAL) ===\n", model_name))
    md <- final_nonce %>% filter(model == model_name)
    cat(sprintf("  %d rows | NAs — preference: %d, GenPref_centered: %d, binom: %d\n",
                nrow(md),
                sum(is.na(md$preference)),
                sum(is.na(md$GenPref_centered)),
                sum(is.na(md$binom))))

    result <- list()

    # ── Model A: GenPref effect ──────────────────────────────────────────────
    md_a <- md %>%
      filter(!is.na(preference), !is.na(GenPref_centered), !is.na(binom))

    if (nrow(md_a) < 10) {
      message("  Skipping Model A: < 10 complete cases")
    } else {
      cat("  → Model A: preference ~ GenPref_centered + (1 | binom)\n")
      fit_a <- brm(
        preference ~ GenPref_centered + (1 | binom),
        data    = md_a, family = gaussian(), prior = bayes_priors,
        chains  = 4, cores = 4, iter = 12000, warmup = 6000, seed = 964,
        silent  = 2,
        file    = sprintf("brms_cache/final_nonce_%s_modelA",
                          gsub("[/:-]", "_", model_name)),
        control = list(adapt_delta = 0.98)
      )
      print(round(summary(fit_a)$fixed, 3))
      rstan::check_hmc_diagnostics(fit_a$fit)

      # Extract what we need, then discard the model object
      fe_a <- fixef(fit_a)
      result$model_a_fixed <- as.data.frame(fe_a) %>%
        rownames_to_column("parameter") %>%
        mutate(model = model_name, item_type = "Nonce", checkpoint = "final")

      rm(fit_a); gc()
    }

    # ── Model B: Individual constraints ─────────────────────────────────────
    md_b <- md %>%
      filter(!is.na(preference), !is.na(binom),
             !is.na(Form), !is.na(Percept), !is.na(Culture), !is.na(Power),
             !is.na(Intense), !is.na(Icon), !is.na(Freq), !is.na(Len),
             !is.na(Lapse), !is.na(BStress))

    if (nrow(md_b) < 15) {
      message("  Skipping Model B: < 15 complete cases")
    } else {
      cat("  → Model B: preference ~ individual constraints + (1 | binom)\n")
      fit_b <- brm(
        preference ~ Form + Percept + Culture + Power + Intense + Icon +
                     Freq + Len + Lapse + BStress + (1 | binom),
        data    = md_b, family = gaussian(), prior = bayes_priors,
        chains  = 4, cores = 4, iter = 12000, warmup = 6000, seed = 964,
        silent  = 2,
        file    = sprintf("brms_cache/final_nonce_%s_modelB",
                          gsub("[/:-]", "_", model_name)),
        control = list(adapt_delta = 0.98)
      )
      print(round(summary(fit_b)$fixed, 3))
      rstan::check_hmc_diagnostics(fit_b$fit)

      fe_b <- fixef(fit_b)
      result$model_b_fixed <- as.data.frame(fe_b) %>%
        rownames_to_column("parameter") %>%
        mutate(model = model_name, item_type = "Nonce", checkpoint = "final")

      rm(fit_b); gc()
    }

    result
  }
)
## 
## === znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 (NONCE - FINAL) ===

cat("\n=== NONCE BINOMIALS (FINAL CHECKPOINT): FIXED EFFECTS SUMMARIES ===\n\n")
## 
## === NONCE BINOMIALS (FINAL CHECKPOINT): FIXED EFFECTS SUMMARIES ===
for (model_name in names(nonce_final_results)) {
  cat(sprintf("\n### %s - NONCE (FINAL)\n", model_name))
  cat("--- Model A: GenPref Effect ---\n")
  print(kable(nonce_final_results[[model_name]]$model_a_fixed, digits = 3))
  cat("\n--- Model B: Individual Constraints ---\n")
  print(kable(nonce_final_results[[model_name]]$model_b_fixed, digits = 3))
}
##

## ### znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 - NONCE (FINAL)
## --- Model A: GenPref Effect ---
## 
## 
## |parameter        | Estimate| Est.Error|   Q2.5| Q97.5|model                                    |item_type |checkpoint |
## |:----------------|--------:|---------:|------:|-----:|:----------------------------------------|:---------|:----------|
## |Intercept        |   -0.325|     0.167| -0.654| 0.002|znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## |GenPref_centered |    0.302|     0.464| -0.609| 1.207|znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## 
## --- Model B: Individual Constraints ---
## 
## 
## |parameter | Estimate| Est.Error|   Q2.5| Q97.5|model                                    |item_type |checkpoint |
## |:---------|--------:|---------:|------:|-----:|:----------------------------------------|:---------|:----------|

## 
## |parameter | Estimate| Est.Error|   Q2.5| Q97.5|model                          |item_type |checkpoint |
## |:---------|--------:|---------:|------:|-----:|:------------------------------|:---------|:----------|
## |Intercept |   -0.161|     0.133| -0.422| 0.103|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## |Form      |   -0.005|     0.498| -0.992| 0.959|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## |Percept   |    0.157|     0.183| -0.208| 0.507|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## |Culture   |   -0.292|     0.204| -0.700| 0.100|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## |Power     |   -0.020|     0.211| -0.439| 0.387|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |

## |Icon      |    0.003|     0.489| -0.976| 0.953|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## |Freq      |    0.037|     0.069| -0.101| 0.170|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## |Len       |   -0.185|     0.116| -0.410| 0.045|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## |Lapse     |    0.777|     0.220|  0.364| 1.205|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |
## |BStress   |   -0.222|     0.277| -0.756| 0.359|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Nonce     |final      |

Attested Binomials: Final Checkpoint

attested_final_results <- map(
  setNames(unique(final_attested$model), unique(final_attested$model)),
  function(model_name) {
    cat(sprintf("\n=== %s (ATTESTED - FINAL) ===\n", model_name))
    md <- final_attested %>% filter(model == model_name)

    result <- list()

    # ── Model A: GenPref + frequency interactions ────────────────────────────
    cat("  → Model A: preference ~ GenPref_centered * OverallFreq + RelFreq * OverallFreq + (1 | binom)\n")
    fit_a <- brm(
      preference ~ GenPref_centered * OverallFreq_scaled +
                   RelFreq_centered * OverallFreq_scaled + (1 | binom),
      data    = md, family = gaussian(), prior = bayes_priors,
      chains  = 4, cores = 4, iter = 12000, warmup = 6000, seed = 964,
      silent  = 2,
      file    = sprintf("brms_cache/final_attested_%s_modelA",
                        gsub("[/:-]", "_", model_name)),
      control = list(adapt_delta = 0.98)
    )
    print(round(summary(fit_a)$fixed, 3))
    rstan::check_hmc_diagnostics(fit_a$fit)

    fe_a <- fixef(fit_a)
    result$model_a_fixed <- as.data.frame(fe_a) %>%
      rownames_to_column("parameter") %>%
      mutate(model = model_name, item_type = "Attested", checkpoint = "final")

    rm(fit_a); gc()

    # ── Model B: Individual constraints + frequency interactions ─────────────
    cat("  → Model B: preference ~ constraints + frequencies + interactions + (1 | binom)\n")
    fit_b <- brm(
      preference ~ Form + Percept + Culture + Power + Intense + Icon +
                   Freq + Len + Lapse + BStress +
                   OverallFreq_scaled + RelFreq_centered +
                   RelFreq_centered:OverallFreq_scaled +
                   Form:OverallFreq_scaled     + Percept:OverallFreq_scaled  +
                   Culture:OverallFreq_scaled  + Power:OverallFreq_scaled    +
                   Intense:OverallFreq_scaled  + Icon:OverallFreq_scaled     +
                   Freq:OverallFreq_scaled     + Len:OverallFreq_scaled      +
                   Lapse:OverallFreq_scaled    + BStress:OverallFreq_scaled  +
                   (1 | binom),
      data    = md, family = gaussian(), prior = bayes_priors,
      chains  = 4, cores = 4, iter = 12000, warmup = 6000, seed = 964,
      silent  = 2,
      file    = sprintf("brms_cache/final_attested_%s_modelB",
                        gsub("[/:-]", "_", model_name)),
      control = list(adapt_delta = 0.98, max_treedepth = 12)
    )
    print(round(summary(fit_b)$fixed, 3))
    rstan::check_hmc_diagnostics(fit_b$fit)

    fe_b <- fixef(fit_b)
    result$model_b_fixed <- as.data.frame(fe_b) %>%
      rownames_to_column("parameter") %>%
      mutate(model = model_name, item_type = "Attested", checkpoint = "final")

    rm(fit_b); gc()

    result
  }
)
## 
## === znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 (ATTESTED - FINAL) ===

## Form                                   0.318     0.234   -0.139    0.779 1.001

cat("\n=== ATTESTED BINOMIALS (FINAL CHECKPOINT): FIXED EFFECTS SUMMARIES ===\n\n")
## 
## === ATTESTED BINOMIALS (FINAL CHECKPOINT): FIXED EFFECTS SUMMARIES ===
for (model_name in names(attested_final_results)) {
  cat(sprintf("\n### %s - ATTESTED (FINAL)\n", model_name))
  cat("--- Model A: GenPref + Frequency Interactions ---\n")
  print(kable(attested_final_results[[model_name]]$model_a_fixed, digits = 3))
  cat("\n--- Model B: Individual Constraints + Frequency Interactions ---\n")
  print(kable(attested_final_results[[model_name]]$model_b_fixed, digits = 3))
}
##

## |:-----------------------------------|--------:|---------:|------:|-----:|:------------------------------|:---------|:----------|
## |Intercept                           |    0.175|     0.076|  0.026| 0.326|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Form                                |    0.182|     0.252| -0.313| 0.661|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Percept                             |    0.046|     0.134| -0.208| 0.312|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Culture                             |    0.216|     0.139| -0.047| 0.486|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Power                               |    0.071|     0.204| -0.338| 0.476|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Intense                             |    0.448|     0.246| -0.039| 0.940|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Icon                                |    0.291|     0.219| -0.133| 0.690|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Freq                                |    0.062|     0.053| -0.043| 0.162|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Len                                 |    0.165|     0.115| -0.064| 0.397|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Lapse                               |   -0.065|     0.174| -0.414| 0.274|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |BStress                             |   -0.041|     0.214| -0.447| 0.395|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |OverallFreq_scaled                  |    0.109|     0.079| -0.042| 0.268|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |RelFreq_centered                    |    2.044|     0.302|  1.442| 2.621|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |OverallFreq_scaled:RelFreq_centered |    1.883|     0.273|  1.339| 2.409|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Form:OverallFreq_scaled             |    0.326|     0.264| -0.189| 0.844|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Percept:OverallFreq_scaled          |    0.250|     0.132| -0.010| 0.510|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Culture:OverallFreq_scaled          |    0.205|     0.153| -0.088| 0.508|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Power:OverallFreq_scaled            |   -0.285|     0.173| -0.626| 0.044|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Intense:OverallFreq_scaled          |    0.104|     0.279| -0.448| 0.649|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Icon:OverallFreq_scaled             |    0.018|     0.200| -0.375| 0.415|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Freq:OverallFreq_scaled             |    0.059|     0.061| -0.063| 0.172|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Len:OverallFreq_scaled              |    0.107|     0.118| -0.126| 0.344|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |Lapse:OverallFreq_scaled            |   -0.135|     0.191| -0.508| 0.226|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |
## |BStress:OverallFreq_scaled          |    0.172|     0.221| -0.248| 0.605|znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 |Attested  |final      |

Final Checkpoint: Key Effects Summary (95% Credible Intervals)

cat("\n=== KEY EFFECTS AT FINAL CHECKPOINT: 95% CREDIBLE INTERVALS ===\n\n")
## 
## === KEY EFFECTS AT FINAL CHECKPOINT: 95% CREDIBLE INTERVALS ===
cat("NONCE BINOMIALS - GenPref Effects:\n")
## NONCE BINOMIALS - GenPref Effects:
map_dfr(names(nonce_final_results), function(mn) {
  nonce_final_results[[mn]]$model_a_fixed %>%
    filter(parameter == "GenPref_centered")
}) %>%
  select(model, parameter, Estimate, Est.Error, Q2.5, Q97.5) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model parameter Estimate Est.Error Q2.5 Q97.5
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 GenPref_centered 0.291 0.488 -0.640 1.263
znhoughton/opt-babylm-125m-64eps-seed964 GenPref_centered 0.262 0.476 -0.584 1.218
znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 GenPref_centered 0.302 0.464 -0.609 1.207
znhoughton/opt-c4-1.3b-seed964 GenPref_centered 0.115 0.460 -0.778 1.010
znhoughton/opt-c4-125m-seed964 GenPref_centered -0.095 0.439 -0.949 0.764
znhoughton/opt-c4-350m-seed964 GenPref_centered -0.077 0.447 -0.946 0.784 
cat("\n\nATTESTED BINOMIALS - GenPref and Frequency Effects:\n")
## 
## 
## ATTESTED BINOMIALS - GenPref and Frequency Effects:
map_dfr(names(attested_final_results), function(mn) {
  attested_final_results[[mn]]$model_a_fixed %>%
    filter(grepl("GenPref_centered|OverallFreq|RelFreq", parameter))
}) %>%
  select(model, parameter, Estimate, Est.Error, Q2.5, Q97.5) %>%
  kable(digits = 3)
model parameter Estimate Est.Error Q2.5 Q97.5
znhoughton/opt-babylm-1.3b-64eps-seed964 GenPref_centered 0.780 0.426 -0.065 1.613

znhoughton/opt-babylm-350m-64eps-seed964 RelFreq_centered 1.945 0.274 1.403 2.472

Final Checkpoint: Plots

# GenPref effect at final checkpoint
nonce_genpref_final <- map_dfr(names(nonce_final_results), function(mn) {
  nonce_final_results[[mn]]$model_a_fixed %>%
    filter(parameter == "GenPref_centered") %>%
    transmute(
      model     = mn,
      item_type = "Nonce",
      estimate  = Estimate,
      lower     = Q2.5,
      upper     = Q97.5
    )
})

attested_genpref_final <- map_dfr(names(attested_final_results), function(mn) {
  attested_final_results[[mn]]$model_a_fixed %>%
    filter(parameter == "GenPref_centered") %>%
    transmute(
      model     = mn,
      item_type = "Attested",
      estimate  = Estimate,
      lower     = Q2.5,
      upper     = Q97.5
    )
})

# Individual constraint effects at final checkpoint
nonce_constraint_final <- map_dfr(names(nonce_final_results), function(mn) {
  nonce_final_results[[mn]]$model_b_fixed %>%
    filter(parameter %in% CONSTRAINT_COLS) %>%
    transmute(
      model      = mn,
      item_type  = "Nonce",
      constraint = parameter,
      estimate   = Estimate,
      lower      = Q2.5,
      upper      = Q97.5
    )
})

attested_constraint_final <- map_dfr(names(attested_final_results), function(mn) {
  attested_final_results[[mn]]$model_b_fixed %>%
    filter(parameter %in% CONSTRAINT_COLS) %>%
    transmute(
      model      = mn,
      item_type  = "Attested",
      constraint = parameter,
      estimate   = Estimate,
      lower      = Q2.5,
      upper      = Q97.5
    )
})
bind_rows(nonce_genpref_final, attested_genpref_final) %>%
  mutate(
    model     = fct_model(model),
    item_type = factor(item_type, levels = c("Nonce", "Attested"))
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = model, y = estimate, color = model, shape = item_type)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.25,
                position = position_dodge(0.5), linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3.5, position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = CORPUS_COLORS, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Nonce" = 16, "Attested" = 17)) +
  labs(
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "GenPref coefficient (posterior mean ± 95% CrI)",
    title    = "GenPref Effect at Final Checkpoint",
    subtitle = "Bayesian: preference ~ GenPref_centered + (1 | binom)",
    shape    = "Binomial type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "right"
  )

bind_rows(nonce_constraint_final, attested_constraint_final) %>%
  mutate(
    model      = fct_model(model),
    item_type  = factor(item_type, levels = c("Nonce", "Attested")),
    constraint = factor(constraint, levels = CONSTRAINT_COLS)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = model, y = estimate, color = model, shape = item_type)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), width = 0.25,
                position = position_dodge(0.5), linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, position = position_dodge(0.5)) +
  facet_wrap(~ constraint, scales = "free_y", ncol = 5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = CORPUS_COLORS, guide = "none") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Nonce" = 16, "Attested" = 17)) +
  labs(
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Coefficient (posterior mean ± 95% CrI)",
    title    = "Individual Constraint Effects at Final Checkpoint",
    subtitle = "Bayesian: preference ~ all constraints + (1 | binom) | BabyLM (left) → C4 (right) within each panel",
    shape    = "Binomial type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "right"
  )

Part B: Effects Over Training

Fit Bayesian models at logarithmically-sampled checkpoints using a fit → extract → discard strategy: model objects are never accumulated in memory. Extracted coefficients are saved to CSV after each item-type loop so the notebook is resumable if interrupted (brms will skip refitting from cache, and the CSVs will already hold any completed extractions).

cat(sprintf(
  "Training data: nonce %d rows (%d checkpoints), attested %d rows (%d checkpoints)\n",
  nrow(training_nonce),    n_distinct(training_nonce$checkpoint),
  nrow(training_attested), n_distinct(training_attested$checkpoint)
))
## Training data: nonce 14934 rows (87 checkpoints), attested 67716 rows (87 checkpoints)
# Paths for cached trajectory CSVs
traj_cache <- list(
  nonce_genpref    = file.path(processed_path, "traj_nonce_genpref_bayes.csv"),
  attested_genpref = file.path(processed_path, "traj_attested_genpref_bayes.csv"),
  attested_freq    = file.path(processed_path, "traj_attested_freq_bayes.csv")
)

Nonce Binomials: Training Trajectory

# ── Load from cache if available, otherwise fit ──────────────────────────────
if (file.exists(traj_cache$nonce_genpref)) {
  message("Loading nonce GenPref trajectory from cache: ", traj_cache$nonce_genpref)
  nonce_genpref_traj <- read_csv(traj_cache$nonce_genpref, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  nonce_traj_rows <- list()

  for (model_name in unique(training_nonce$model)) {
    model_df <- training_nonce %>% filter(model == model_name)

    for (ckpt in unique(model_df$checkpoint)) {
      cat(sprintf("\n=== %s | checkpoint %s (NONCE) ===\n", model_name, ckpt))
      ckpt_data <- model_df %>% filter(checkpoint == ckpt)

      fit_a <- brm(
        preference ~ GenPref_centered + (1 | binom),
        data    = ckpt_data, family = gaussian(), prior = bayes_priors,
        chains  = 4, cores = 4, iter = 12000, warmup = 6000, seed = 964,
        silent  = 2,
        file    = sprintf("brms_cache/training_nonce_%s_%s_modelA",
                          gsub("[/:-]", "_", model_name), ckpt),
        control = list(adapt_delta = 0.98)
      )
      print(round(summary(fit_a)$fixed, 3))
      rstan::check_hmc_diagnostics(fit_a$fit)

      # Extract immediately, discard model
      coefs <- fixef(fit_a)
      nonce_traj_rows[[length(nonce_traj_rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
        model      = model_name,
        checkpoint = ckpt,
        tokens     = unique(ckpt_data$tokens),
        step       = unique(ckpt_data$step),
        item_type  = "Nonce",
        estimate   = coefs["GenPref_centered", "Estimate"],
        lower      = coefs["GenPref_centered", "Q2.5"],
        upper      = coefs["GenPref_centered", "Q97.5"]
      )

      rm(fit_a); gc()
    }
  }

  nonce_genpref_traj <- bind_rows(nonce_traj_rows)
  write_csv(nonce_genpref_traj, traj_cache$nonce_genpref)
  message("Saved nonce GenPref trajectory to: ", traj_cache$nonce_genpref)
}

Attested Binomials: Training Trajectory

# ── Frequency parameters to track ───────────────────────────────────────────
FREQ_PARAMS <- c(
  "OverallFreq_scaled",
  "RelFreq_centered",
  "GenPref_centered:OverallFreq_scaled",
  "RelFreq_centered:OverallFreq_scaled"
)

if (file.exists(traj_cache$attested_genpref) && file.exists(traj_cache$attested_freq)) {
  message("Loading attested trajectories from cache.")
  attested_genpref_traj <- read_csv(traj_cache$attested_genpref, show_col_types = FALSE)
  attested_freq_traj    <- read_csv(traj_cache$attested_freq,    show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  attested_genpref_rows <- list()
  attested_freq_rows    <- list()

  for (model_name in unique(training_attested$model)) {
    model_df <- training_attested %>% filter(model == model_name)

    for (ckpt in unique(model_df$checkpoint)) {
      cat(sprintf("\n=== %s | checkpoint %s (ATTESTED) ===\n", model_name, ckpt))
      ckpt_data <- model_df %>% filter(checkpoint == ckpt)

      fit_a <- brm(
        preference ~ GenPref_centered * OverallFreq_scaled +
                     RelFreq_centered * OverallFreq_scaled + (1 | binom),
        data    = ckpt_data, family = gaussian(), prior = bayes_priors,
        chains  = 4, cores = 4, iter = 12000, warmup = 6000, seed = 964,
        silent  = 2,
        file    = sprintf("brms_cache/training_attested_%s_%s_modelA",
                          gsub("[/:-]", "_", model_name), ckpt),
        control = list(adapt_delta = 0.98)
      )
      print(round(summary(fit_a)$fixed, 3))
      rstan::check_hmc_diagnostics(fit_a$fit)

      coefs  <- fixef(fit_a)
      tokens <- unique(ckpt_data$tokens)
      step   <- unique(ckpt_data$step)

      # GenPref trajectory row
      attested_genpref_rows[[length(attested_genpref_rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
        model      = model_name,
        checkpoint = ckpt,
        tokens     = tokens,
        step       = step,
        item_type  = "Attested",
        estimate   = coefs["GenPref_centered", "Estimate"],
        lower      = coefs["GenPref_centered", "Q2.5"],
        upper      = coefs["GenPref_centered", "Q97.5"]
      )

      # Frequency trajectory rows (one row per parameter)
      for (param in FREQ_PARAMS) {
        if (param %in% rownames(coefs)) {
          attested_freq_rows[[length(attested_freq_rows) + 1]] <- tibble(
            model      = model_name,
            checkpoint = ckpt,
            tokens     = tokens,
            step       = step,
            parameter  = param,
            estimate   = coefs[param, "Estimate"],
            lower      = coefs[param, "Q2.5"],
            upper      = coefs[param, "Q97.5"]
          )
        }
      }

      rm(fit_a); gc()
    }
  }

  attested_genpref_traj <- bind_rows(attested_genpref_rows)
  attested_freq_traj    <- bind_rows(attested_freq_rows)

  write_csv(attested_genpref_traj, traj_cache$attested_genpref)
  write_csv(attested_freq_traj,    traj_cache$attested_freq)
  message("Saved attested trajectories to cache.")
}

Training Trajectory: Plots

bind_rows(nonce_genpref_traj, attested_genpref_traj) %>%
  mutate(model = fct_model(model)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = estimate, color = model, fill = model)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_grid(item_type ~ model, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = CORPUS_COLORS) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = CORPUS_COLORS) +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "GenPref coefficient (posterior mean ± 95% CrI)",
    title    = "Bayesian GenPref Effect Over Training",
    subtitle = "Nonce (top) vs. Attested (bottom) | BabyLM (left) → C4 (right)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

attested_freq_traj %>%
  mutate(
    model     = fct_model(model),
    parameter = factor(
      parameter,
      levels = FREQ_PARAMS,
      labels = c("OverallFreq", "RelFreq",
                 "GenPref × OverallFreq", "RelFreq × OverallFreq")
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = estimate, color = model, fill = model)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_grid(parameter ~ model, scales = "free") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = CORPUS_COLORS) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = CORPUS_COLORS) +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "Coefficient (posterior mean ± 95% CrI)",
    title    = "Bayesian Frequency Effects Over Training (Attested Binomials)",
    subtitle = "BabyLM (left) → C4 (right)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position  = "none",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

Training Trajectory: Individual Constraint Effects (OLS)

nonce_constraints %>%
  mutate(model = fct_model(model)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = coefficient, color = constraint)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "OLS coefficient",
    title    = "Individual Constraint Effects Over Training — NONCE Binomials",
    subtitle = "OLS at ~19 log-sampled checkpoints | BabyLM (top row) → C4 (bottom row)",
    color    = "Constraint"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2))

attested_constraints %>%
  mutate(model = fct_model(model)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = coefficient, color = constraint)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_wrap(~ model, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "OLS coefficient",
    title    = "Individual Constraint Effects Over Training — ATTESTED Binomials",
    subtitle = "OLS at ~19 log-sampled checkpoints | BabyLM (top row) → C4 (bottom row)",
    color    = "Constraint"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2))

bind_rows(
  nonce_constraints    %>% mutate(item_type = "Nonce"),
  attested_constraints %>% mutate(item_type = "Attested")
) %>%
  mutate(
    model     = fct_model(model),
    item_type = factor(item_type, levels = c("Nonce", "Attested"))
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tokens, y = coefficient, color = constraint)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  facet_grid(item_type ~ model, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-9, suffix = "B")) +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  labs(
    x        = "Training tokens",
    y        = "OLS coefficient",
    title    = "Constraint Effects Over Training: Nonce vs. Attested",
    subtitle = "OLS at ~19 log-sampled checkpoints | BabyLM (left) → C4 (right)",
    color    = "Constraint"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position  = "bottom"
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(nrow = 2))
